new_ai_implementations.headline: Acme Corp ships GenAI-powered customer-support copilot
new_ai_implementations.one_line_summary: Acme rolled out an internal copilot that summarizes tickets and drafts replies for support agents.

new_ai_implementations.headline: Widget.ai launches autonomous research agent for legal teams
new_ai_implementations.one_line_summary: Widget.ai released an agent that drafts case summaries and citations from uploaded briefs.

new_or_updated_llms.headline: Anthropic releases Claude Opus 4.7 with longer context
new_or_updated_llms.one_line_summary: Opus 4.7 extends effective context and improves tool-use reliability, per the model card.

us_insurer_ai.headline: Progressive pilots AI-driven first-notice-of-loss triage
us_insurer_ai.one_line_summary: Progressive announced a pilot using LLMs to triage claim intake calls and route complex losses.

us_insurer_ai.headline: Lemonade extends GenAI underwriting to small-commercial lines
us_insurer_ai.one_line_summary: Lemonade said its AI underwriter now prices small-commercial policies in select states.

global_insurer_ai.headline: Allianz partners with local vendor on fraud-detection AI in Germany
global_insurer_ai.one_line_summary: Allianz announced a partnership to deploy AI-based fraud detection across motor claims in Germany.
